question: What is the color of the rectangular sheet being folded? A. White B. Black C. Light Brown D. Dark Grey
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A rectangular white sheet of paper rests on a flat black surface while two hands with light skin tones manipulate it. The hands fold the paper in half lengthwise, with the left hand pressing down firmly to create a crease and the right hand holding the edge steady. Fingers spread across the width to smooth the folded strip against the background.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a hand enters the frame from the right side; at 4s, both hands press down on the lower corners of the sheet; at 6s, the hands fold the paper lengthwise while pressing a crease; at 14s, the hands firmly sharpen the crease on the folded strip; at 18s, the hands continue pressing the final fold flat.
